verdict.recommendation: Do not accept this document without manual review by a qualified officer. Multiple high-confidence anomalies detected.

explanation: This document scored 90/100 on the forgery risk index and is classified as HIGH RISK. Multiple strong indicators of manipulation were detected. High-confidence findings: Noise Inconsistency, Sharp Edit Boundary, Isolated Dark Region. Moderate findings: Stroke Width Variation. Pixel-noise analysis flagged a region with abnormal variance (confidence 76%). Inconsistent noise fingerprints indicate possible cloning or content pasting. Edge-gradient analysis detected a sharp boundary (confidence 95%) that is inconsistent with normal document rendering. This is a common artefact of pasted image regions. Layout analysis detected structural irregularities (confidence 100%): Isolated dark region detected at (0,0) with pixel density 100. Typography analysis flagged font inconsistencies (confidence 44%). Text rendered in different styles within a single field is a common forgery indicator.
